title: helianthemum alyssoides var. scabrosum
intro: Helianthemum alyssoides var. scabrosum, also known as rockrose or alpine rose, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Cistaceae family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Helianthemum alyssoides var. scabrosum include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe skin irritations, and act as an antimicrobial agent, which can help to prevent the spread of infections. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it can also be used in topical applications, such as salves or creams, to harness its medicinal properties.
